name: Waru Monzaemon

signature_move.name: Heartbreak Attack
signature_move.description: Uses black, broken heart projectiles to depress everyone so that they completely lose their fighting spirit.

description: This fiendish-faced Puppet Digimon is a far cry from Monzaemon . It's on good terms with Metal Etemon , and it is said that the Waru Monzaemon plush toy it wears on its waist is something that Waru Monzaemon sent to it. Still, similar to Monzaemon, its true form is unclear, but the peeking out of its strange, shining eyes from within is eerie. Its personality is the epitome of wickedness, and it is malicious and treacherous. Its left arm is equipped with the character " Evil " and the powerful " Bear Claw " of a grizzly bear . Its Special Move is giving everything a dark mood and depressing them ( Heartbreak Attack ). If you suffer this attack, your feelings become dark and sorrowful, and you completely lose your fighting spirit.
